summary: Joel Spolsky announces an upcoming free public speech at UC Davis on the topic of designing applications with the user in mind. The post is a brief event announcement providing the date, time, and location. It invites anyone in the Davis/Sacramento area to attend the talk on January 29, 2004.
key_points: Joel will speak about user-centered application design at UC Davis
The event is free and open to the public
The talk is scheduled for January 29, 2004 at the University Club
money_quotes: I will be speaking on the subject of Designing Applications with the User in Mind at UC Davis on January 29th.
key_insight: This is a brief event announcement for a talk on user-centered design, with no substantive technical content to analyze.
